title: Content
description: A social-media post reference displayed as a preview card in the app; tapping opens the post on its source platform. Lives in content/{slug}.json. Preview image is a sibling file with matching basename (e.g. forehand-smash.png), scraped/hosted by us — not a remote URL.

source_platform.description: Platform where the post is hosted

techniques.description: Leaf technique slugs this post covers (e.g. ['smash'])

person.description: Slug reference to a file in people/

level.description: Amateur level range [min, max] on the 1-9 system. 1-3 beginner, 4-6 intermediate, 7-9 advanced.

duration.description: Duration in M:SS or MM:SS format (optional; some posts aren't time-based)

editor_notes.description: Editorial notes about why this content is included
